authDisabledAlert: Token based authentication is currently disabled. Contact your DataHub administrator to enable this feature.
copyWarning: Make sure to copy your access token now. You won't be able to see it again.
emptyDescription: Generate a new token to get started.
learnMoreDescription: To learn more about the DataHub APIs, check out the <link>DataHub Docs</link>.
nameTooLong: Token name must be 50 characters or less
noAccessDescription: You don't have permission to manage access tokens.
noTokensFoundDescription: No tokens match the current filters.
pageSubTitle: Manage Access Tokens for use with DataHub APIs.
revokeConfirmText: Anyone using this token will no longer be able to access the DataHub API. You cannot undo this action.
revokeConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to revoke this token?
selectServiceAccountSubtitle: Choose a service account to generate an API token for.
tokenUsageDescription: To use the token, provide it as a <kbd>Bearer</kbd> token in the <kbd>Authorization</kbd> header when making API requests:
tokenWillExpireOn: The token will expire on {{date}} at {{time}}.
